hooks.command: EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.end", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, status: "success", agentType: (.agent_type // .tool_input.subagent_type), agentId: .agent_id, runnerVersion: (.version // env.CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION // null), args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64), response: (.tool_response | tojson | @base64), transcriptPath: .transcript_path}}') && echo "$EVENT" | SUBOCULO_DB_PATH="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/events.db" node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.end", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, status: "error", isInterrupt: (.is_interrupt // false), agentType: (.agent_type // .tool_input.subagent_type), agentId: .agent_id, runnerVersion: (.version // env.CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION // null), args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64), response: ((.error // "unknown error") | tojson | @base64), transcriptPath: .transcript_path}}') && echo "$EVENT" | SUBOCULO_DB_PATH="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/events.db" node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.start", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, agentType: (.agent_type // .tool_input.subagent_type), agentId: .agent_id, runnerVersion: (.version // env.CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION // null), args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | SUBOCULO_DB_PATH="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/events.db" node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "subagent.spawn", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, data: {agentId: .agent_id, agentType: .agent_type, runnerVersion: (.version // env.CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION // null)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | SUBOCULO_DB_PATH="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/events.db" node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "subagent.stop", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, data: {agentId: .agent_id, agentType: .agent_type, runnerVersion: (.version // env.CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION // null), response: (.last_assistant_message | tojson | @base64)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | SUBOCULO_DB_PATH="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/events.db" node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

CLI_VERSION=$(claude --version 2>/dev/null | sed -nE 's/.*([0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+([.-][A-Za-z0-9]+)?).*/\1/p' | head -n1 || true); RUNNER_VERSION="${CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION:-$CLI_VERSION}"; EVENT=$(jq -c --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-}" --arg dir "$(pwd)" --arg ver "$RUNNER_VERSION" '{ts: $ts, event: "session.start", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: (.session_id // (if $sid == "" then null else $sid end)), data: {directory: $dir, model: (.model // null), runnerVersion: (if $ver == "" then null else $ver end)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | SUBOCULO_DB_PATH="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/events.db" node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)
